media.c(3) Library Functions Manual media.c(3)

NAME

media.c - Media file and stream options.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define RENDER_FILE_MODES (OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY)

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_media_entries []

Detailed Description

Media file and stream options.

Options for streaming from media files, URLs, seeking, looping, and cookie handling for streaming services.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file media.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define RENDER_FILE_MODES (OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY)

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_media_entries[]

Definition at line 37 of file media.c.

37                                          {
38     // Media File Streaming Options
39     {"file",
40      'f',
41      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
42      offsetof(options_t, media_file),
43      "",
44      0,
45      "Stream from media file or stdin (use '-' for stdin). Supported formats: see man ffmpeg-formats; codecs: see man "
46      "ffmpeg-codecs.",
47      "MEDIA",
48      NULL,
49      false,
50      "ASCII_CHAT_FILE",
51      NULL,
52      NULL,
53      false,
54      false,
55      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
56      {0},
57      NULL},
58     {"url",
59      'u',
60      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
61      offsetof(options_t, media_url),
62      "",
63      0,
64      "Stream from network URL. Direct HTTP/HTTPS/RTSP streams use FFmpeg; complex sites (YouTube, TikTok, etc.) use "
65      "yt-dlp. Supported formats: see man ffmpeg-formats; codecs: see man ffmpeg-codecs; sites: yt-dlp "
66      "https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/blob/master/README.md#supported-sites.",
67      "MEDIA",
68      NULL,
69      false,
70      "ASCII_CHAT_URL",
71      NULL,
72      NULL,
73      false,
74      false,
75      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
76      {0},
77      NULL},
78     {"loop",
79      'l',
80      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
81      offsetof(options_t, media_loop),
82      &default_media_loop_value,
83      sizeof(bool),
84      "Loop media file playback (not supported for --url).",
85      "MEDIA",
86      NULL,
87      false,
88      "ASCII_CHAT_LOOP",
89      NULL,
90      NULL,
91      false,
92      false,
93      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
94      {0},
95      NULL},
96     {"pause",
97      '\0',
98      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
99      offsetof(options_t, pause),
100      &default_pause_value,
101      sizeof(bool),
102      "Start playback paused (toggle with spacebar, requires --file or --url).",
103      "MEDIA",
104      NULL,
105      false,
106      "ASCII_CHAT_PAUSE",
107      NULL,
108      NULL,
109      false,
110      false,
111      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
112      {0},
113      NULL},
114     {"seek",
115      's',
116      OPTION_TYPE_CALLBACK,
117      offsetof(options_t, media_seek_timestamp),
118      &default_media_seek_value,
119      sizeof(double),
120      "Seek to timestamp before playback (format: seconds, MM:SS, or HH:MM:SS.ms).",
121      "MEDIA",
122      NULL,
123      false,
124      "ASCII_CHAT_SEEK",
125      NULL,
126      parse_timestamp,
127      false,
128      false,
129      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
130      {.examples = g_seek_examples, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_STRING},
131      NULL},
132     {"yt-dlp-options",
133      '\0',
134      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
135      offsetof(options_t, yt_dlp_options),
136      NULL,
137      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->yt_dlp_options),
138      "Arbitrary yt-dlp options passed to the extraction subprocess for URL resolution. "
139      "Examples: --no-warnings or --proxy socks5://127.0.0.1:1080 or --cookies-from-browser=firefox.",
140      "MEDIA",
141      NULL,
142      false,
143      "ASCII_CHAT_YT_DLP_OPTIONS",
144      NULL,
145      NULL,
146      false,
147      false,
148      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
149      {0},
150      NULL},
151     {"video-codec",
152      '\0',
153      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
154      offsetof(options_t, video_codec),
155      "hevc",
156      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->video_codec),
157      "Video codec for streaming (raw, hevc). raw=uncompressed RGB, hevc=H.265 compression. Default: hevc.",
158      "MEDIA",
159      "CODEC",
160      false,
161      "ASCII_CHAT_VIDEO_CODEC",
162      NULL,
163      NULL,
164      false,
165      false,
166      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR,
167      {0},
168      NULL},
169 
170 #define RENDER_FILE_MODES (OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY)
171 
172     {"render-file",
173      '\0',
174      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
175      offsetof(options_t, render_file),
176      "",
177      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->render_file),
178      "Render ASCII frames to stdout or video/image file. Use '-' for stdout; extension determines format: "
179      ".mp4, .mov, .webm, .avi, .gif, .png, .jpg  (macOS and Linux only).",
180      "MEDIA",
181      "PATH",
182      false,
183      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_FILE",
184      NULL,
185      NULL,
186      false,
187      false,
188      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
189      {0},
190      NULL},
191 
192     {"render-theme",
193      '\0',
194      OPTION_TYPE_CALLBACK,
195      offsetof(options_t, render_theme),
196      &default_render_theme_value,
197      sizeof(int),
198      "Terminal color scheme for rendered output: dark, light, auto.  (macOS and Linux only).",
199      "MEDIA",
200      "THEME",
201      false,
202      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_THEME",
203      NULL,
204      parse_render_theme,
205      false,
206      false,
207      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
208      {.enum_values = g_render_theme_values,
209       .enum_descriptions = g_render_theme_descs,
210       .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_ENUM},
211      NULL},
212 
213     {"render-font",
214      '\0',
215      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
216      offsetof(options_t, render_font),
217      "",
218      sizeof(((options_t *)0)->render_font),
219      "Font for render-file output: bundled names (matrix or default), system font names, or absolute .ttf/.otf path. "
220      "Default: matrix (Matrix Resurrected font). Falls back to default (DejaVu Sans Mono) if unavailable. "
221      "Examples: matrix, default, JetBrains Mono, Nerd Font Mono, /path/to/font.ttf. "
222      "(macOS and Linux only).",
223      "MEDIA",
224      "FONT",
225      false,
226      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_FONT",
227      NULL,
228      NULL,
229      false,
230      false,
231      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
232      {0},
233      NULL},
234 
235     {"render-font-size",
236      '\0',
237      OPTION_TYPE_DOUBLE,
238      offsetof(options_t, render_font_size),
239      &default_render_font_size_value,
240      sizeof(double),
241      "Font size in points for render-file output (default: 12.0, must be > 0, fractional sizes supported e.g. 10.5).  "
242      "(macOS and Linux only).",
243      "MEDIA",
244      "SIZE",
245      false,
246      "ASCII_CHAT_RENDER_FONT_SIZE",
247      validate_render_font_size,
248      NULL,
249      false,
250      false,
251      RENDER_FILE_MODES,
252      {.input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},
253      NULL},
254 
255     REGISTRY_TERMINATOR()};
